caption: A man with dark skin and glasses wears a large, stylized grey wig, a white button-down shirt with suspenders, and a red bow tie. He sits in a room with a wall decorated with numerous small framed photographs. He wears black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. To his right, a mannequin is partially visible. In the background, clothing and a "LEE" logo are seen. Two logos appear on the screen: a red and white one that reads "PODCAST" and "ESTALIO," and another that says "GOSS TALK JOY." The man remains in a similar seated position throughout the sequence, slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks. The background, equipment, and lighting remain constant across the frames, indicating a stable studio setting.
